value_chain_position: Engineering design and simulation platform layer — sells the dominant CAD/CAM/BIM toolchain (AutoCAD, Revit, Fusion 360) used to design physical products, buildings, and factories, increasingly integrating digital twin and generative design for manufacturing and construction.
relative_comps: Autodesk is the workflow monopoly in AEC (architecture/engineering/construction) and a dominant position in manufacturing CAD; 18% YoY growth reflects subscription model maturation and Fusion 360 penetration in manufacturing. Competing against Siemens/Dassault Systemes in enterprise PLM and PTC in industrial IoT adjacency. FCF margin of 36% is superior to PTC and BSY; the robotics_automation tag is grounded in Fusion 360's generative design for manufacturing and direct integration with robot simulation workflows.
